calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, AUG-12-2009:
Stevenson Browne (sued as Stevenson Brown) dba Monetary Management Corporation Appellant/Defendant appearing in propria persona with witness Jake Vreeburg; Robert Anderson and Rick Holthouse, Respondents/Plaintiffs appearing in propria persona

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Respondents Robert Anderson and Rick Holthouse testify on their on behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - repair bill
Exhibit 2 - diagram of apartment

Appellant Stevenson Browne and witness Jake Vreeburg testify on behalf of Monetary Management Corporation. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - photocopies of checks
Exhibit B - invoice

At the conclusion of the hearing, trial exhibits are retained, and the matter is taken under submission.
JPT Joseph Jedeikin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Continued To Jun-05-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
